acceptance_criteria: The recursive playbook defines the common loop, stage outputs, recursion rules, and verification gates.
Each role procedure maps to a specific stage artifact and handoff.

open_questions.question: Prompt procedures remain documentation in this first pass rather than runtime agent manifests.

objective: Map the process method into docs and agent guidance.
design_summary: The shared playbook lives under docs/process.
Role procedures live under agents/procedures and follow the same stage model as the validator.
public_interface_changes: Document the repository-standard recursive loop and required stage artifacts.
boundary_impacts: Agents gain explicit procedure docs without changing runtime manifests.
